title: Website Template Collection
content: The Achra and Vetra brand packages each contain 16 website page templates in their website/ directories, providing comprehensive coverage of common web application page types. The templates are: about, blog-article, careers, changelog, contact, dashboard, documentation, ecommerce-product, error-404, faq, landing-page, login, newsletter, portfolio, pricing, and product. Each template is a self-contained HTML file that can be opened directly in a browser, incorporating the brand's color tokens, typography, and component patterns. The Powerhouse parent brand takes a different approach -- instead of the 16-template set, it includes a powerhouse-io.html file that recreates the actual powerhouse.io website, along with reference screenshots in the website-reference/ directory. Source: https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems/tree/main/achra/website and https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems/tree/main/vetra/website.
description: Achra and Vetra each include 16 website page templates covering landing, pricing, blog, dashboard, ecommerce, and more.
